name: report_npi_addresses
short_description: Get report contents with addressing data in columns: NPI cell name, base address, site name
full_help:
report_npi_addresses

Description: 
Get report contents with addressing data in columns: NPI cell name, base address, site name

Syntax: 
report_npi_addresses  [-regexp] [-nocase] [-filter <arg>] [-of_objects <args>]
                      [-all] [-quiet] [-verbose] [<patterns>]

Returns: 
Report

Usage: 
  Name           Description
  --------------------------
  [-regexp]      Patterns are full regular expressions
  [-nocase]      Perform case-insensitive matching. (valid only when -regexp 
                 specified)
  [-filter]      Filter list with expression
  [-of_objects]  Get the Report of these Cell, Site, or Tile.
  [-all]         Report information about all the NPI Elements used and 
                 unused.
  [-quiet]       Ignore command errors
  [-verbose]     Suspend message limits during command execution
  [<patterns>]   Match Report against patterns
                 Default: *

Categories: 
Report, NPI

arguments.description: Perform case-insensitive matching. (valid only when -regexp specified)
